# tenableio_agent_group (Resource)

Manages an agent group in Tenable.io.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the agent group. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `agents_count` (Number) Number of agents in the group.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier for the agent group.
- `owner` (String) The owner of the agent group.
- `owner_id` (Number) The ID of the agent group owner.
- `shared` (Number) Whether the agent group is shared.
